task: Show me the monthly weather forecast for Florida City.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to AccuWeather, searched for Florida City, selected the correct result ('Florida City, FL US'), and opened the Monthly forecast page. The final page title and URL confirm the correct destination: 'Florida City, FL Monthly Weather | AccuWeather' at the monthly weather URL. The page visibly shows the monthly forecast calendar and summary for Florida City, including May 2026 daily entries and the summary text with highs/lows and averages. This satisfies the request to show the monthly weather forecast for Florida City.
final_result_response:
I opened AccuWeather’s monthly forecast for Florida City, FL.

It’s showing May 2026, with forecast highs mostly 87° to 92° and lows around 69° to 76°. Current month summary says average high 89° and average low 73°.
action_history: Opening AccuWeather: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.accuweather.com/');
Searching for Florida City: await page.locator('e11').fill('Florida City');
Opening Florida City forecast: await page.locator('e23').click();
